description: It cuts down on time and gives us more time to focus on the patient's needs.
author: Reagan G.
pros: Fast, easy, and mobile! It makes the doctors schedule way faster, and they can even fit in more patients.
cons: There were really no cons for us. Everything worked as promised and helped our doctors get their work done quickly.

description: better recently since updates the hpi notes are much better, the sunoh recording doesn't time out or not give me a recording like it used to before where I wouild lose the information
author: Anelize R.
pros: Now with the improvements the hPIC notes are much better formulated and it doesn't mistake the provider for the patient
cons: When having visit in other languages like Spanish information transcribed not correct. I still only use HPIC which is helpful but would love if plan and things fit where they should go based on the visit and I didn't have to do these separately

description: I tried Sunoh because it was recommended for use with eClinical Works. I ended up switching back to the previous AI scribe I'd used (Freed) because it was better for half the cost. Other physicians in our medical group have also become frustrated and stopped their subscriptions to Sunoh.
author: Eric M.
pros: Not much. It does a reasonable job of summarizing the H&P (although it still needs to be heavily edited, see below).
cons: Sunoh makes a lot of errors. I spend as much time cleaning up mistakes as I used to spend just dictating notes myself. Sometimes Sunoh changes things that shouldn't be changed. Just one Example, I told a patient I was going to prescribe a steroid ointment, Sunoh said I was prescribing a cream (ointments & creams are very different things, as any dermatologist will tell you). Why would it do that? In the assessment and plan, Sunoh often changes the diagnosis. Example: even though I've entered a diagnosis of uncontrolled diabetes (E11.65), Sunoh hears me talking about diabetes and assigns a new diagnosis of diabetes without complications (E11.9). It's like the system is trying to be helpful, but it's actually creating more work for me to cut the plan from E11.9 and paste it under E11.65. Unlike prior AI software I've used, Sunoh doesn't allow me to instruct it on my preferred style. There's a button that asks, "Was this helpful?" but if you click "No" it doesn't allow you to offer specific feedback on why. The folks at eCW have been entirely unhelpful at addressing these problems when I've brought them to their attention. Sunoh has a window on the screen that gets in the way of accessing some of the EMR features, so I have to keep moving the box around to access other buttons. It's somewhat glitchy, and has sometimes stopped recording mid-visit for no apparent reason. There are many more issues, but those should give a broad idea of why I'm cancelling my $200/month subscription.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Good pricing relative to other AI scribes.
description: Overall this has been a solid investment. It makes documentation smoother, keeps my notes more consistent, and frees up time I can spend on patient care or finishing the day earlier. If you are looking for a reliable AI scribe that meaningfully reduces typing without adding too many headaches, Sunoh is worth a look.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Best Value per dollar for AI scribes I've seen. Sunoh AI Scribe has become a valuable part of how we document visits. It takes a lot of the routine typing off plates and leaves us more present with patients. It catches most of what is said and turns it into usable notes. That alone has saved time each week.
cons: It is not perfect. It still needs occasional cleanup, especially with complex conversations or overlapping speakers. There are times when I have to go back and adjust phrasing or correct a few details. That extra step still takes less time than doing notes from scratch, but it is worth mentioning.

review_title: Sunoh killed the Video Star (a song reference, not a violence reference.)
description: great product and inadequate training - much like my experience with the launch of ECW.
author: Kenneth L.
pros: The seamless scribe feature really does work quite well. I did not go to med school to be a scribe.
cons: Too many clicks to get it turned on and it shuts off many functions while on

description: Some of our providers like using it and find it most helpful for same-day visits, ER follow-ups or extensive visits involving multiple topics.
author: Tammy L.
pros: It is very helpful for summarizing discussions during visits, allowing us to spend more time with the patient rather than typing.
cons: It does not always capture everything accurately. It would be nice if it were better at recognizing and processing orders, prescriptions, and imaging requests correctly.

description: There is a learning curve. I think the system is still picking up too many unnecessary information. I would like the system to know when the doctor is actually dictating rather than interpret it as a conversation so the system transcribes it verbatim. I would like the system to be more intuitive with lab results and test results and add them in the PLAN section as well.
author: neal C.
pros: The speed at which you can have a transcribed HPI is really helpful. after switching to a low volume concierge practice the price of other AI services are not justified, with sunohs pay per use this becomes a very attractive selling point.
cons: not as intuitive. i find that Sunoh tends to over simplify the verbage of the plan.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Thomas C.
pros: Quick and easy to communicate with patients and providers without it feeling like you're pulling teeth
cons: The system crashes at least twice a day and you lose any progress you have made with no way to recover

review_title: Great Charting Tool. I can return to being a Physician, not a Scribe!
description: It's an excellent tool for all physicians and mid levels. Makes charting easier, more complete, more accurate, and helps us to actually listen to our patients instead of worrying about charting.
author: Neelay G.
pros: Definitely makes SOAP notes easier to complete, and more importantly, the ability to actually talk to the patient and not have to worry about typing in details so you don't forget.
cons: I still think that the orders that he suggests are not accurate in most cases. If it was able to search my favorite orders and choose from there instead of coming up with a random order that it thinks that I meant. Having said that, the Assessment and Plan section has improved a fair amount with the latest update.

description: The experience has been positive and well accepted at the organization with most providers.
author: Trey D.
pros: The speed in learning how to use and the accuracy of the progress note once completed. Also the Spanish interpretation is a wonderful addition.
cons: Nothing really disliked about it. Maybe just wish we could have had this years ago.

author: Vikas S.
pros: It's integrated within the chart and it is easy to review and insert directly into the chart.
cons: We have to remember to turn it on and off. And the recording expiring in few days :)
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: It is a very mind blowing renovation in healthcare!
author: Joseph D.
pros: It seems to help the providers complete their workflow at a faster pace.
cons: It sometimes does not recognize medication names.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Jennifer W.
pros: it does help providers with notes most specifically with new patient notes and the efficiency of these
cons: I truly cannot speak for any corrections to make at this point

description: It is a helpful tool most of the time. I appreciate it formulating the HPI. It is still click heavy as I often have to clean up the order section or put it in from scratch.
author: marcus C.
pros: The more I use it, the better it gets on the HPI section. It seems to be better at picking up parts of the plan I mention during the visit (ordering labs/imaging/referral)
cons: It is still cumbersome on the ipad to get the a/p transferred over to a note. It doesn't pickup the exam well when talking through it with a patient during the visit. Even with it capturing potential orders, it is still lacking on capturing the full plan. I've even tried saying "the plan is to..." but it is still lacking.

description: Good but a lot of improvement needs to made to treatment to make it a true game changer. AI is great, but need to marry it with ability to just transcribe specific information.
author: Mike C.
pros: Capturing and summarizing the HPI through ambient listening
cons: Inability to dictate verbatim what I want in the chart, especially the assessment and plan or treatment notes. A scribe command would be helpful. Ordering labs and meds is still a crapshoot

description: Excellent and overall best performance and affordable
author: Mohammad Babar K.
pros: Well captured and way easy to integrate and accurate
cons: Lack of automatic communication with the EMR for not integrated with Dx codes and sending referrals and automated test ordering capabilities

description: Excellent. Cut down my time of documenting by 50% and does better job than before
author: Seth E.
pros: Add diagnosis to my visit . Also gets improvements so much much better than 6 months ago
cons: Problem added by AI can be so similar to one already placed in moye

author: Praveen M.
pros: Provides me sometime to get the hang of the issues the patient is having and it allows me to have an eye contact with them. Also, I dont have to take my system home and finish documentation.
cons: It would have been great if it would have allowed to bring in the past data.

description: Patients like the concept and appreciate the eye contact with the providers. From a admin side, I love working with the eCW staff. They are like coworkers to help out with any questions/issues. =)
author: Jason W.
pros: It brings the provider back face-to-face with the patients.
cons: Needs some improvement with the voice recognition between the provider and patient when the voices are similar.

description: Very good, feel it saves me time and captures points which I may not have included in my note otherwise
author: Dania M.
pros: Makes dictation easier and cuts back on time spent typing
cons: Needs improvement in providing diagnoses codes, plan discussed with patient

description: Overall I am encouraged by the decrease in time required for documentation and I think this is going to help my efficiency significantly.
author: Michelle F.
pros: Shortens time required for documentation! Allows for me to go back and review visits and make sure I haven't missed anything. Does a nice job summarizing sometimes complicated conversations with patients.
cons: Sometimes Sunoh puts treatment plans or summaries in HPI in addition to putting them in the treatment section. I would prefer this not happen, although I believe this is a personal style preference and may not be generalizable.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Ashley C.
pros: I have not been able to use it yet. The product activation process was unclear and too long. I joined the webinar prior to my eCW version upgrade and was unaware I would have to rejoin the webinar for Sunoh activation.
cons: The product activation process has taken too long.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: fantastic - has made our day to day charting much better
author: Damaris D.
pros: how much data AI is able to capture is incredible . Coding suggestions is amazing - makes day to day charting easier for Doctor and adminstration
cons: unable to capure Medical assistant voice
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Positive experience overall. The more you use it, the easier/more efficient and accurate it gets.
author: Samar A.
pros: Makes completing notes faster. Accurate note taking.
cons: Takes time to get used to the technology
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Great AI implementation with a few glitches
description: its been great with a few glitches like logging out while in a room with patients.
author: Kristina L.
pros: We like the advantage of real-time charting
cons: not able to include billing/procedure codes through ipad version
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months
